creator: ve2tmq@gmail.com
text:
Hi Marek.

For sure DCO was issue.  My deamon run as openvpn (user/group). 
I disabled DCO and ran it as root/root to test.  It's works.  After, I set back to openvpn/openvpn user/group and still works.  I don't know if first time I ran it need root access.

Well, thanks for your help.
